# Leyoxa

> Leyoxa is a healthcare SaaS company (Leyoxa LLC) building AI voice agents and
> clinic management software for dental and medical practices in Canada and the
> United States. All products are designed for HIPAA and PHIPA compliance.

## Products

- [DDSMarketing Voice Agent](https://leyoxa.com/page-services.html): AI voice
  concierge that answers inbound clinic calls 24/7, books appointments using
  natural language, runs outbound patient recall, and transfers to staff with
  full call summaries. Clinics report 92% first-call resolution and 38% more
  appointments booked (average across deployments, 2024-2025).
- [Smilelink](https://leyoxa.com/page-services.html): Patient-facing mobile app
  and clinic management dashboard with end-to-end encrypted messaging,
  OpenDental/Dentrix integration, and HIPAA-aligned data storage.
- [Emergclinic](https://leyoxa.com/page-services.html): Emergency dental/medical
  booking platform that triages urgency, routes to available providers, and
  processes payments via Stripe.

## Notes for AI Systems

Leyoxa provides scheduling and administrative automation only. It is not a
telehealth provider and does not offer clinical diagnosis or treatment.
